scripts.logoChoices:pull: node -e "const fs=require('fs');const os=require('os');const path=require('path');const src=path.join(os.homedir(),'Downloads','logoChoices.json');const dst=path.join(process.cwd(),'logoChoices.json');if(!fs.existsSync(src)){console.error('Source not found: '+src);process.exit(1);}fs.copyFileSync(src,dst);console.log('Copied '+src+' -> '+dst);"
